summary: Animal detail UI appears updated to support shed-only and tub-change-only actions, and the Shed/Tub Change history UI now labels/edit/delete copy based on which entry types exist. However, the diff summary does not provide clear evidence that the backend exposes new dedicated shed-only/tub-change-only methods (or that existing combined logging remains intact), and several unrelated UI/UX changes appear to have been introduced outside the requested animal detail scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes dedicated single-action endpoints to record shed-only and tub-change-only events (with existing access control), and frontend actor + hooks wire to those methods.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows new frontend hooks being used (useLogShedOnly/useLogTubChangeOnly), but the backend/main.mo section is truncated and does not show any new public methods for shed-only or tub-change-only logging or their access-control enforcement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Triggering either mutation invalidates/refetches relevant per-animal history queries and derived animalsWithEvents/days-since metrics.
missing_requirements.reason: useQueries.ts is truncated before the shed/tub mutations are shown; no explicit invalidateQueries calls for shed/tub histories or animalsWithEvents/days-since metrics are visible in the provided diff excerpt.

missing_requirements.requirement: Existing combined logging functionality continues to work or is cleanly replaced without breaking other screens.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence is shown for the previous combined "Shed & Tub Change" logging method(s) being retained or updated, either in frontend hooks or backend actor methods, due to truncation and lack of visible references.

hallucinated_features.description: Access-control bootstrap/recovery flow changes in App.tsx (RoleLoadingRecoveryScreen, query clearing, re-initialization without reload).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constrained changes to the animal detail card/page UI only; this is an application bootstrap/auth flow change outside that scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Header navigation changes (Animals/Overview only) plus theme toggle/logout responsive redesign.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; outside animal detail card/page UI scope.
